chunks.text: 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Omar Sial Mr. Justice Muhammad Hassan (Akber) Spl. Cr. Anti-Terrorism Appeal No.106 of 2024 [Muneer Hussain vs. The State] Appellant: Muneer Hussain through Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Advocate Respondent: The State through Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Awan, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh Date of Hearing: 16.04.2025 Date of Decision: 05.05.2025 ORDER Omar Sial, J.: Muneer Hussain was convicted and sentenced on 05.08.2024 by the learned Anti-Terrorism Court No. 10 at Karachi as follows: (i) Seven years for an offence under section 324 P.P.C. (ii) Two years for an offence under section 353 P.P.C. 2. Learned counsel submits that he will not argue the appeal on merits but requested that the sentence already undergone by Muneer Hussain may be treated as his final sentence. The jail roll shows that he has served out six years and two months of the seven years sentence. The allegation of the ineffective firing on the police is not on the appellant but on co-accused Naveed. He is said to have accompanied Naveed in this incident. Learned Additional Prosecutor General has no objection if in the circumstances of the case and in light of the 2 evidence led at trial, the seven-year sentence be reduced to the time the appellant has already spent in jail. This would include the sentence in lieu of the fine. 3. The appeal is dismissed subject to the above modification in sentence. Muneer Hussain may be released if not required in any other custody case. JUDGE JUDGE
